mapper.select: SELECT DD.CODE as RECV_TEL_NUM ,DD.CODE_DESC as RECV_USER_NM FROM STOCCODD DD WHERE DD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DD.CODE_TYPE = 'M170' AND LANG_CD = #{ses.langCd} AND USE_FLAG = '1' AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO STOCBLOG (
JOB_SQ,
JOB_DATE, JOB_TYPE, JOB_ID, JOB_KEY, JOB_RLT, JOB_RLT_CD, JOB_RLT_MSG, JOB_END_DATE ) VALUES (
SEQ_STOCBLOG.NEXTVAL,
(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi'), #{JOB_TYPE}, #{JOB_ID}, #{JOB_KEY}, #{JOB_RLT}, #{JOB_RLT_CD}, #{JOB_RLT_MSG}, (SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi') )
mapper.select:
SELECT A.GATE_CD, A.TEXT_NUM FROM STOCTXTH A WHERE A.GATE_CD = '100' #{ses.gateCd}
AND A.TEXT_CONTENTS IS NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STOCTXTD WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND TEXT_NUM = A.TEXT_NUM AND TEXT_CONTENTS IS NOT NULL)
